scripts.sign:bundle: codesign --force --sign - --entitlements src-tauri/entitlements.plist --identifier dev.aaronzhang.peer.capture src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Peer.app/Contents/MacOS/PeerCapture && codesign --force --sign - --entitlements src-tauri/entitlements.plist --identifier dev.aaronzhang.peer src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Peer.app
scripts.sidecar: swift build --package-path capture-sidecar -c release && mkdir -p src-tauri/bin src-tauri/target/debug/bin && cp capture-sidecar/.build/release/PeerCapture src-tauri/bin/PeerCapture-aarch64-apple-darwin && cp capture-sidecar/.build/release/PeerCapture src-tauri/target/debug/bin/PeerCapture-aarch64-apple-darwin && codesign --force --sign - src-tauri/bin/PeerCapture-aarch64-apple-darwin && codesign --force --sign - src-tauri/target/debug/bin/PeerCapture-aarch64-apple-darwin
